title: COURT CARE DROP IN CHILD CARE - 211info
text: YMCA OF MARION AND POLK COUNTIES COURT CARE DROP IN CHILD CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Short-duration childcare providing drop-in childcare for parents or guardians needing to attend court-related or other business related matters. 685 Court Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Must have a court related or other business reason for drop-in child care Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-12:30pm, Wednesday 8:30am-2:30pm Email (503) 581-9622 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 581-9622 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 5am-9:30pm, Saturday 7am-7pm, Sunday 1pm-6:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On the corner of Cottage Street and Court Street in downtown Salem. Services: Child Care Expense Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - CAMPS SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YMCA OF MARION AND POLK COUNTIES
